databaseEditor.maxFileSizeMb.markdownDescription: Maximum SQLite file size, in MB, loaded by the WebAssembly editor backend. Set to `0` for unlimited. The current editor uses the WASM backend; future native streaming backends are not limited by this value.

databaseEditor.defaultPageSize.markdownDescription: Default rows per page in the data grid when a database opens.

databaseEditor.autoPagination.markdownDescription: Automatically append the next chunk of data-grid rows when scrolling to the bottom. Previously loaded rows remain available when scrolling back up.

databaseEditor.maxRows.markdownDescription: Maximum browsable rows per table/view after filtering (0 = unlimited). Paging still applies within this cap.

markdownEnumDescriptions: Automatically save the custom editor after every database change.
Keep edits in VS Code's dirty custom editor until the normal Save command runs.
Automatically save only for non-file URI schemes such as remote or virtual workspaces.
databaseEditor.instantCommit.markdownDescription: Controls whether grid, schema, and SQL workspace writes automatically run VS Code Save after marking the database dirty.

markdownEnumDescriptions: Edit editable scalar cells directly in the grid; BLOBs and read-only cells fall back to the row modal.
Open the row-detail modal on cell double-click.
databaseEditor.doubleClickBehavior.markdownDescription: Cell double-click action in the data grid.

markdownEnumDescriptions: Use VS Code's native save dialog and workspace filesystem APIs for BLOB export.
Use a browser-style webview download link for BLOB export.
databaseEditor.blobExportMode.markdownDescription: Controls how BLOB values are exported from row details.

databaseEditor.queryTimeoutMs.markdownDescription: Soft query time budget in milliseconds for grid browsing and row-stepped reads. SQLite/WASM can only check the timeout between statement steps, not while a single SQLite step is executing.

databaseEditor.maxUndoMemoryBytes.markdownDescription: Maximum combined before/after snapshot bytes retained for a single undoable database edit. Edits above this budget still mark the database dirty but skip per-edit undo snapshots to avoid excessive memory use.

databaseEditor.copilot.enable.markdownDescription: Enable Copilot chat participant and Agent Mode tools for open SQLite databases.

databaseEditor.copilot.maxResultRows.markdownDescription: Maximum rows returned by a Copilot SQLite query.

databaseEditor.copilot.queryTimeoutMs.markdownDescription: Soft execution time budget for Copilot read-only queries and analysis.

databaseEditor.copilot.sensitiveColumnPa.markdownDescription: Case-insensitive regular expressions for columns whose query values are redacted before being returned to Copilot.

markdownEnumDescriptions: Copilot tools may inspect schema and run read-only queries only.
Copilot tools may also run user-confirmed INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, and schema changes.
databaseEditor.copilot.accessMode.markdownDescription: Controls whether Copilot tools can propose database modifications.

chatParticipants.name: sqlite
chatParticipants.description: Helps you inspect, query, and edit open SQLite databases.

commands.name: schema
commands.description: Inspect the selected database object or schema

commands.name: query
commands.description: Write or run a read-only SQLite query

commands.name: profile
commands.description: Profile the selected table or view

disambiguation.description: The user wants help with an open SQLite database.
examples: What tables are in this database?
Write a query for the selected table.
Add an index for this lookup.

languageModelTools.name: databaseEditor_list_open_databases
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Lists SQLite database files currently open in SQLite Database Editor. Use this first when no databaseUri is known.

languageModelTools.name: databaseEditor_db_context
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns schema context for an open SQLite database: tables, views, columns, primary keys, foreign keys, indexes, triggers, CREATE SQL, and row counts. Use before writing queries or suggesting schema changes.

databaseUri.description: URI returned by databaseEditor_list_open_databases. Omit to use the active database.

objectName.description: Optional table or view name to focus on.

offset.description: Zero-based object offset for paginating schema summaries. Use nextOffset from the previous result to request the next page.

limit.description: Maximum number of schema objects to return for summary pages. Defaults to 50 and is capped at 100.

languageModelTools.name: databaseEditor_query
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Runs one read-only SELECT/WITH query against an open SQLite database and returns capped JSON rows. Do not use for INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, DDL, PRAGMA, ATTACH, VACUUM, or multi-statement scripts.

databaseUri.description: URI returned by databaseEditor_list_open_databases. Omit to use the active database.

query.description: A single read-only SQLite SELECT or safe WITH query.

queryName.description: Short human-readable name for this query.

queryDescription.description: Why this query is being run.

languageModelTools.name: databaseEditor_explain
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Runs EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN for one validated read-only SELECT/WITH query.

query.description: One read-only SELECT or safe WITH query.

languageModelTools.name: databaseEditor_profile
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns row count, null counts, and distinct counts for a focused table or view without returning sample values.

languageModelTools.name: databaseEditor_modify
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Runs one user-confirmed SQLite write or schema statement against an open database. Only available when databaseEditor.copilot.accessMode is read/write. Use for CREATE, ALTER, DROP, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE after explaining the change clearly.

databaseUri.description: URI returned by databaseEditor_list_open_databases. Omit to use the active database.

statement.description: A single well-formatted SQLite statement to execute.

statementName.description: Short human-readable name for this modification.

languageModelTools.name: databaseEditor_migrate
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Atomically executes 1-50 user-confirmed SQLite modification statements as one undoable database edit.

migrationDescription.description: What the migration changes and why.

scripts.validate:local: pnpm run vendor:sqljs:check && pnpm test && pnpm run fixture:sqlite && pnpm run vsce:package
